pages.text: The $(item)Large Frozen Skyseed$() — snow and packed ice. Snowy or icy by biome, with a frozen lake over frozen ones.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A grand frozen isle — tall and broad. It takes after the cold it lands in: deep powder snow and spruce over snowy lands, bare packed and blue ice with ice spikes over frozen ones.

$(bold)Snow or ice$()$(br)Packed ice, blue ice, and the hidden $(item)powder snow$() traps run through the core. Over a frozen biome — frozen ocean, peaks, ice spikes — it turns properly icy and a sheet-ice $(bold)frozen lake$() sets into its surface; over snowy biomes it stays deep powder and spruce, with no lake.
$(bold)Cold company$()$(br)Polar bears, rabbits, and foxes wander the snow.
